rationale: The citing paper uses Heide, Wathne, and Rokkan (2007) directly in its hypothesis development for monitoring, including a quoted definition with a page citation. Monitoring is one of the paper's core governance practices, so this reference helps set up a central construct rather than serving only as a background list mention. The citing study does not test or refine the cited paper's specific social-contract contingencies; instead, it carries the monitoring concept into the review-platform trust context.
relation_description: The citing paper adopts the cited paper's conceptualization of monitoring compliance and uses it to theorize monitoring as a key trust-building governance mechanism. It applies that governance idea from interfirm relationships to online review platforms.
